description_long: This house features a striking geometric facade with bold black and white stripes and angular patterns, giving it a highly modern and artistic appearance. The front side includes a balcony with a metal railing and large glass windows, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the interior. The roof is flat and partially covered with a grid-like structure, possibly for ventilation or as a skylight. The sides of the house are dominated by vertical black and white stripes, creating a visually dynamic effect. The rear of the house showcases expansive glass panels, revealing a staircase and open-plan interior. The overall structure is rectangular and compact, with a minimalist yet visually impactful design.
description: A modern, rectangular house with bold black and white geometric patterns, large glass windows, and a flat roof. The design is minimalist and visually striking, featuring a balcony and open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, large glass windows, and the main entryway beneath the balcony.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by vertical black and white stripes, with a portion of the flat roof and grid structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with expansive glass panels revealing the staircase and open interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with vertical stripes and a section of the flat roof visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway beneath balcony, glass door, minimal steps, no porch or decorative columns
